overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in traditional Japanese attire walking through a lush rural landscape. The character travels along stone paths and stairs, passing through a village with traditional wooden architecture and ascending to the Akashima Temple complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path with stone retaining walls and dense vegetation

events.description: peasant NPC passes by on the left walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path between stone walls and vegetation

notable_agents.action: peasant in straw hat walking past the camera on the left side

entered.detail: moss-covered stone wall running alongside the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the vegetation
thick green bushes and small trees lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path flanked by moss-covered stone walls on the left and dense vegetation on the right. A peasant NPC passes by in the opposite direction. The path winds through a lush, green environment with filtered sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with terraced fields and wooden farmhouses

events.description: exits narrow walled path into open area with terraced fields and farmhouses
passes by wooden farmhouse and continues through village area

agents.ego_description: walking through the village outskirts, passing fields and traditional buildings

entered.detail: green rice paddies or agricultural fields on the right side
traditional Japanese wooden building with tiled roof
traditional stone lantern along the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a village area with terraced agricultural fields and traditional wooden farmhouses. The character walks along the path passing stone lanterns and wildflowers, transitioning from the enclosed walled path to a more open rural setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway leading to temple gate

events.description: begins ascending the stone stairs toward the temple gate
passes through the large wooden temple gate into the courtyard

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs and passing through the temple gate

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with moss-covered steps leading upward
large traditional wooden temple gate with curved tiled roof
ornate stone lanterns flanking the stairway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by ornate stone lanterns, approaching a large traditional wooden temple gate. The environment becomes more structured and architectural as the character climbs toward the temple entrance and passes through the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with traditional buildings and gardens

events.description: UI element appears indicating 'Akashima Temple' location

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple courtyard, observing the traditional architecture

entered.detail: open stone-paved courtyard within the temple complex
traditional wooden temple structures with curved roofs
trees with pink blossoms visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the character explores the temple courtyard with its traditional wooden buildings and stone pathways. The area opens up to reveal more of the temple complex, with cherry blossom trees visible in the distance and a UI marker indicating this is Akashima Temple.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded, overgrown trail into the structured grandeur of a temple complex. It begins along a narrow dirt path enclosed by mossy stone walls and dense vegetation, where the character passes a peasant under filtered sunlight. As the path winds forward, the enclosed surroundings open into a rural village characterized by terraced agricultural fields, wooden farmhouses, and scattered wildflowers. The scene then shifts toward a more formal architectural style as the character ascends a wide stone staircase lined with ornate lanterns, leading directly through a massive wooden temple gate. Finally, the camera moves into the expansive courtyard of Akashima Temple, revealing traditional wooden buildings and distant cherry blossom trees.
